board.name: Pemberton and ongoing

pin.caption: Sand glazed terracotta, irregular face, warm grout
Unglazed floor in a sunlit hallway
Smoked oak, hidden hardware, quiet lines
Pale plaster, low winter sun, long shadows
Ivory sheers, oatmeal boucle, layered texture

board.note: Beauty is structural. Build on what is already saved, do not start fresh.
